project_info.name: Finly
project_info.description: Financial Analyst dashboard application for startups and SMEs
project_info.target_audience: Indonesian SMEs, Startup Founders, Financial Analysts

theme.vibe: Authority, precision, functional beauty, editorial ledger, serious finance
theme.spacing_scale: Generous (p-6, p-8 for containers, tight gap-4 for grids)

headings.usage: Page titles, KPI numbers, large structural text

numbers_data.usage: All financial figures, amounts, dates, table cells, and ML data points

rules: No Inter or Roboto or Space Grotesk.
Overlines must be uppercase, tiny, wide spacing (tracking-[0.2em]).

layout_grids.global_dashboard: The Control Room Grid. 12-col base. Sidebar col-span-2 or 3, Main Content col-span-10 or 9.
layout_grids.surfaces: Grid Borders (The Technical Look). Expose the skeleton. border-collapse style layout. No drop shadows, just 1px solid borders.

components_strategy.buttons: Sharp corners. hover:bg-black/90 hover:text-white. Use data-testid for all.
components_strategy.inputs: Shadcn based. border-black/20 focus:border-black focus:ring-1 focus:ring-black.
components_strategy.tables: Dense. JetBrains Mono for data cells. border-b border-black/10 on rows.
components_strategy.charts: Recharts. No rounded bars. Sharp lines. Stroke width 2. Income = #059669, Expense = #E11D48.
components_strategy.ml_prediction_module: Use the 'Terminal/Retro-futurism' micro-theme. Render this specific section with a deep black background, white/neon blue text, and stark glowing lines to visually distinguish 'AI Prediction' from 'Historical Data'.

accessibility.testing: All interactive elements MUST include data-testid attribute (e.g., data-testid='login-submit-button').
accessibility.contrast: Ensure APCA standards. Text over dark ML widget must be high contrast.

auth_hero_bg.description: Abstract architectural graphic for Auth Page left split-screen. Use object-cover and grayscale filter for high contrast.

module_specifics.Auth: Split screen layout. Left side: image auth_hero_bg (opacity 80%). Right side: Minimalist login form, purely functional.
module_specifics.Dashboard: Beranda. 4 KPI cards: Total Pendapatan, Total Pengeluaran, Laba/Rugi, Jml Transaksi. Graph: AreaChart or LineChart for Daily Income vs Outcome.
module_specifics.Transaction Form: Pencatatan Transaksi. Toggle (Pemasukan/Pengeluaran). Dropdown Kategori. Input Nominal (auto-format Rp). DatePicker (Shadcn Calendar).
module_specifics.Budgeting: Anggaran. Table with Columns: Kategori, Anggaran (Target), Realisasi (Actual), Selisih (Difference). Use red/green for Selisih.
module_specifics.Transaction Details: Detail Transaksi. Table with filter (Date/Category), search bar, pagination. Export to CSV button.
module_specifics.ML Prediction: Prediksi ML. Day-range slider (7, 14, 30, custom). Terminal-styled cards for 'Estimasi Penjualan'. LineChart (Sales Forecast). Detail Table.
module_specifics.Prediction History: Riwayat Prediksi. List of past runs. Click opens Shadcn Sheet (Drawer) on the right showing the detailed chart of that past run.

instructions_to_main_agent: You are working with .js / .jsx files, NOT TypeScript.
Do NOT use 'Inter', 'Roboto', or 'Space Grotesk'. Import 'Chivo', 'IBM Plex Sans', and 'JetBrains Mono' from Google Fonts.
For the ML module, wrap it in a div with 'bg-[#0A0A0A] text-[#E5E5E5] border border-white/20' to give it a distinct AI/Terminal vibe.
Use exact Indonesian terminology provided (Beranda, Prediksi ML, etc.).
Format all money as IDR (Rp X.XXX.XXX). Use Intl.NumberFormat('id-ID', { style: 'currency', currency: 'IDR' }).
Implement 'data-testid' aggressively on forms, buttons, and chart wrappers.
Replace all default Shadcn rounded borders with 'rounded-none' or 'rounded-sm' to maintain the Swiss Brutalist look.
Build the dashboard using CSS Grid with 1px border lines separating sections (Technical Layout).
Do not use generic blue/purple colors. Rely entirely on grayscale architecture with Signal Red/Green for semantic meaning.
